query:
CREATE TABLE `site_content` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`section` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'text',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `site_content_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `site_content_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2YRD47rk759bQ8C.root --database Uy2Bh4aWGeFtZA8ypA6NX3 --execute CREATE TABLE `site_content` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`section` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`type` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'text',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `site_content_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `site_content_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);
